scripts.sync-anchor: CURRENT_ID=$(grep 'libp2p host online' ../../nodld/nodld.log | tail -n 1 | sed -n 's/.*"peerID":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -z "$CURRENT_ID" ]; then echo 'ERROR: Peer ID not found in nodld.log'; exit 1; fi; sed -i "s/NEXT_PUBLIC_ANCHOR_PEER_ID=.*/NEXT_PUBLIC_ANCHOR_PEER_ID=$CURRENT_ID/" .env.local; sed -i "s|NEXT_PUBLIC_ANCHOR_MULTIADDR=.*|NEXT_PUBLIC_ANCHOR_MULTIADDR=/ip4/127.0.0.1/tcp/10000/ws/p2p/$CURRENT_ID|" .env.local; echo "Successfully synchronized Anchor to PeerID: $CURRENT_ID"
